contents:
[package]
name = "accesskit"
version = "0.22.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "UI accessibility infrastructure across platforms"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
features = ["schemars", "serde"]

[dependencies.enumn]
version = "0.1.6"
optional = true

[dependencies.pyo3]
version = "0.26"
optional = true

[dependencies.schemars]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
default-features = false
features = ["alloc", "derive"]
optional = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0"
default-features = false
optional = true

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1"
default-features = false

[features]
enumn = ["dep:enumn"]
pyo3 = ["dep:pyo3"]
serde = ["dep:serde", "enumn", "uuid/serde"]
schemars = ["dep:schemars", "dep:serde_json", "serde", "schemars/uuid1"]

[package]
name = "accesskit_atspi_common"
version = "0.15.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "AccessKit UI accessibility infrastructure: core AT-SPI translation layer"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[features]
simplified-api = []

[dependencies]
serde = "1.0"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22.0"
path = "../../common"

[dependencies.accesskit_consumer]
version = "0.32.0"
path = "../../consumer"

[dependencies.atspi-common]
version = "0.13"
default-features = false

[dependencies.zvariant]
version = "5.4"
default-features = false

[package]
name = "accesskit_consumer"
version = "0.32.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "AccessKit consumer library (internal)"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22.0"
path = "../common"

[dependencies.hashbrown]
version = "0.16"
default-features = false
features = ["default-hasher"]

[package]
name = "accesskit_macos"
version = "0.23.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "AccessKit UI accessibility infrastructure: macOS adapter"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
default-target = "x86_64-apple-darwin"

[dependencies]
objc2 = "0.5.1"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22.0"
path = "../../common"

[dependencies.accesskit_consumer]
version = "0.32.0"
path = "../../consumer"

[dependencies.hashbrown]
version = "0.16"
default-features = false
features = ["default-hasher"]

[dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.2.0"
features = ["NSArray", "NSDictionary", "NSValue", "NSThread"]

[dependencies.objc2-app-kit]
version = "0.2.0"
features = ["NSAccessibility", "NSAccessibilityConstants", "NSAccessibilityElement", "NSAccessibilityProtocols", "NSResponder", "NSView", "NSWindow"]

[package]
name = "accesskit_unix"
version = "0.18.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "AccessKit UI accessibility infrastructure: Linux adapter"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[features]
default = ["async-io"]
async-io = ["dep:async-channel", "dep:async-executor", "dep:async-task", "dep:futures-util"]
tokio = ["dep:tokio", "dep:tokio-stream"]

[dependencies]
futures-lite = "2.3"
serde = "1.0"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22.0"
path = "../../common"

[dependencies.accesskit_atspi_common]
version = "0.15.0"
path = "../atspi-common"

[dependencies.atspi]
version = "0.29"
default-features = false
features = ["proxies"]

[dependencies.zbus]
version = "5.5"
default-features = false
features = ["async-io"]

[dependencies.async-channel]
version = "2.1.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.async-executor]
version = "1.5.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.async-task]
version = "4.3.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.futures-util]
version = "0.3.27"
optional = true

[dependencies.tokio-stream]
version = "0.1.14"
optional = true

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.32.0"
optional = true
features = ["macros", "net", "rt", "sync", "time"]

[package]
name = "accesskit_windows"
version = "0.30.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "AccessKit UI accessibility infrastructure: Windows adapter"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
default-target = "x86_64-pc-windows-msvc"
targets = []

[dependencies]
static_assertions = "1.1.0"
windows-core = "0.61.0"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22.0"
path = "../../common"

[dependencies.accesskit_consumer]
version = "0.32.0"
path = "../../consumer"

[dependencies.hashbrown]
version = "0.16"
default-features = false
features = ["default-hasher"]

[dependencies.windows]
version = "0.61.1"
features = ["Win32_Foundation", "Win32_Globalization", "Win32_Graphics_Gdi", "Win32_System_Com", "Win32_System_LibraryLoader", "Win32_System_Ole", "Win32_System_Variant", "Win32_UI_Accessibility", "Win32_UI_Input_KeyboardAndMouse", "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging"]

[dev-dependencies]
once_cell = "1.13.0"
parking_lot = "0.12.4"
scopeguard = "1.1.0"

[dev-dependencies.winit]
git = "https://github.com/pop-os/winit.git"
tag = "cosmic-0.14"

[package]
name = "accesskit_winit"
version = "0.30.0"
authors = ["The AccessKit contributors"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
description = "AccessKit UI accessibility infrastructure: winit adapter"
categories = ["gui"]
keywords = ["gui", "ui", "accessibility", "winit"]
repository = "https://github.com/AccessKit/accesskit"
readme = "README.md"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[features]
default = ["accesskit_unix", "async-io", "rwh_06", "winit/x11", "winit/wayland"]
rwh_05 = ["dep:rwh_05"]
rwh_06 = ["dep:rwh_06"]
async-io = ["accesskit_unix/async-io"]
tokio = ["accesskit_unix/tokio"]

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22.0"
path = "../../common"

[dependencies.winit]
git = "https://github.com/pop-os/winit.git"
tag = "cosmic-0.14"
default-features = false

[dependencies.rwh_05]
package = "raw-window-handle"
version = "0.5"
features = ["std"]
optional = true

[dependencies.rwh_06]
package = "raw-window-handle"
version = "0.6.2"
features = ["std"]
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.accesskit_windows]
version = "0.30.0"
path = "../windows"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.accesskit_macos]
version = "0.23.0"
path = "../macos"

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"openbsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.accesskit_unix]
version = "0.18.0"
path = "../unix"
optional = true
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.accesskit_android]
version = "0.5.0"
path = "../android"
optional = true
features = ["embedded-dex"]

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_os = \"ios\")))".dev-dependencies.softbuffer]
version = "0.4.0"
default-features = false
features = ["x11", "x11-dlopen", "wayland", "wayland-dlopen"]

[dev-dependencies.winit]
git = "https://github.com/pop-os/winit.git"
tag = "cosmic-0.14"
default-features = false
features = ["x11", "wayland", "wayland-dlopen", "wayland-csd-adwaita"]

[package]
name = "atomicwrites"
version = "0.4.2"
authors = ["Markus Unterwaditzer <markus-honeypot@unterwaditzer.net>"]
license = "MIT"
keywords = ["filesystem", "posix"]
readme = "README.md"
description = "Atomic file-writes."
documentation = "https://docs.rs/crate/atomicwrites"
homepage = "https://github.com/untitaker/rust-atomicwrites"
repository = "https://github.com/untitaker/rust-atomicwrites"
exclude = ["/.travis.yml", "/Makefile", "/appveyor.yml"]

[dependencies]
tempfile = "3.1"

[target."cfg(unix)".dependencies.rustix]
version = "0.38.0"
features = ["fs"]

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies.windows-sys]
version = "0.48.0"
features = ["Win32_Foundation", "Win32_Storage_FileSystem"]

[package]
name = "clipboard_macos"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["Héctor Ramón Jiménez <hector0193@gmail.com>"]
edition = "2018"
description = "A library to obtain access to the macOS clipboard"
license = "Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/hecrj/window_clipboard"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/clipboard_macos"
keywords = ["clipboard", "macos"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
default-target = "x86_64-apple-darwin"

[dependencies]
objc = "0.2"
objc_id = "0.1"
objc-foundation = "0.1"

[package]
name = "clipboard_wayland"
version = "0.2.2"
authors = ["Héctor Ramón Jiménez <hector0193@gmail.com>"]
edition = "2018"
description = "A library to obtain access to the clipboard of a Wayland window"
license = "Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/hecrj/window_clipboard"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/clipboard_wayland"
keywords = ["clipboard", "wayland"]

[dependencies.smithay-clipboard]
git = "https://github.com/pop-os/smithay-clipboard"
tag = "sctk-0.20"
features = ["dnd"]

[dependencies.mime]
path = "../mime"

[dependencies.dnd]
path = "../dnd"

[package]
name = "clipboard_x11"
version = "0.4.2"
authors = ["Héctor Ramón Jiménez <hector0193@gmail.com>"]
edition = "2018"
description = "A library to obtain access to the X11 clipboard"
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/hecrj/window_clipboard"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/clipboard_x11"
keywords = ["clipboard", "x11"]

[dependencies]
x11rb = "0.13"
thiserror = "1.0"

[package]
name = "cosmic-config"
version = "1.0.0"
edition = "2024"

[features]
default = ["macro", "subscription"]
dbus = ["dep:zbus", "cosmic-settings-daemon", "futures-util", "subscription"]
macro = ["cosmic-config-derive"]
subscription = ["iced_futures"]

[dependencies]
notify = "8.2.0"
ron = "0.12.0"
serde = "1.0.228"
dirs = "6.0.0"
tracing = "0.1"

[dependencies.cosmic-settings-daemon]
git = "https://github.com/pop-os/dbus-settings-bindings"
optional = true

[dependencies.zbus]
version = "5.14.0"
default-features = false
optional = true

[dependencies.atomicwrites]
git = "https://github.com/jackpot51/rust-atomicwrites"

[dependencies.calloop]
version = "0.14.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.cosmic-config-derive]
path = "../cosmic-config-derive/"
optional = true

[dependencies.iced]
path = "../iced/"
default-features = false
optional = true

[dependencies.iced_futures]
path = "../iced/futures/"
default-features = false
optional = true

[dependencies.futures-util]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.50"
optional = true
features = ["time"]

[dependencies.async-std]
version = "1.13"
optional = true

[target."cfg(unix)".dependencies]
xdg = "3.0"

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies]
known-folders = "1.4.2"

[package]
name = "cosmic-config-derive"
version = "1.0.0"
edition = "2024"

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
syn = "2.0"
quote = "1.0"

[package]
name = "cosmic-freedesktop-icons"
version = "0.4.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT"
description = "A Freedesktop Icons lookup crate"
repository = "https://github.com/pop-os/freedesktop-icons"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["icons", "gui", "freedesktop"]

[dependencies]
bstr = "1.12.1"
btoi = "0.5.0"
memchr = "2.7.6"
memmap2 = "0.9"
thiserror = "2.0"
xdg = "3.0"

[dependencies.tracing]
version = "0.1.41"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies]
speculoos = "0.13.0"
criterion = "0.7"

[features]
default = []
local_tests = []

[[bench]]
name = "simple_lookup"
harness = false

[package]
name = "cosmic-settings-daemon"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies.zbus]
version = "5.14.0"

[dev-dependencies]
futures = "0.3"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["full"]

[dev-dependencies.zbus]
features = ["tokio"]
version = "5.14.0"

[package]
name = "cosmic-text"
description = "Pure Rust multi-line text handling"
version = "0.18.2"
authors = ["Jeremy Soller <jeremy@system76.com>"]
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/cosmic-text/latest/cosmic_text/"
repository = "https://github.com/pop-os/cosmic-text"
rust-version = "1.89"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
features = ["vi"]

[dependencies]
bitflags = "2.10.0"
log = "0.4.29"
rangemap = "1.7.1"
self_cell = "1.2.2"
unicode-linebreak = "0.1.5"
unicode-script = "0.5.8"
unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"

[dependencies.core_maths]
version = "0.1.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.cosmic_undo_2]
version = "0.2.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.fontdb]
version = "0.23"
default-features = false

[dependencies.harfrust]
version = "0.5.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.hashbrown]
version = "0.17"
optional = true
default-features = false

[dependencies.libm]
version = "0.2.16"
optional = true

[dependencies.linebender_resource_handle]
version = "0.1.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.modit]
version = "0.1.5"
optional = true

[dependencies.rustc-hash]
version = "2.1.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.skrifa]
version = "0.40.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.smol_str]
version = "0.3.2"
default-features = false

[dependencies.syntect]
version = "5.3.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.sys-locale]
version = "0.3.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.swash]
version = "0.2.6"
default-features = false
features = ["render", "scale"]
optional = true

[dependencies.unicode-bidi]
version = "0.3.18"
default-features = false
features = ["hardcoded-data"]

[features]
default = ["std", "swash", "fontconfig"]
fontconfig = ["fontdb/fontconfig", "std"]
monospace_fallback = []
no_std = ["hashbrown", "dep:libm", "skrifa/libm", "core_maths", "swash?/libm"]
peniko = []
shape-run-cache = []
std = ["fontdb/memmap", "fontdb/std", "harfrust/std", "linebender_resource_handle/std", "skrifa/std", "swash?/std", "sys-locale", "unicode-bidi/std"]
vi = ["modit", "syntect", "cosmic_undo_2"]
wasm-web = ["sys-locale?/js"]
warn_on_missing_glyphs = []

[[bench]]
name = "layout"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "text_shaping_benchmarks"
harness = false

[workspace]
members = ["examples/*"]

[dev-dependencies]
tiny-skia = "0.11.4"

[dev-dependencies.criterion]
version = "0.8.1"
default-features = false
features = ["cargo_bench_support"]

[profile.test]
opt-level = 1

[package]
name = "cosmic-theme"
version = "1.0.0"
edition = "2024"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
features = ["test_all_features"]
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[features]
default = ["export"]
export = ["serde_json"]
no-default = []

[dependencies]
almost = "0.2"
ron = "0.12.0"
configparser = "3.1.0"
dirs = "6.0.0"
thiserror = "2.0.18"

[dependencies.palette]
version = "0.7.6"
features = ["serializing"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.228"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0.149"
optional = true
features = ["preserve_order"]

[dependencies.csscolorparser]
version = "0.8.3"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.cosmic-config]
path = "../cosmic-config/"
default-features = false
features = ["subscription", "macro"]

[dev-dependencies]
insta = "1.47.2"

[profile.dev.package.insta]
opt-level = 3

[profile.dev.package.similar]
opt-level = 3

[package]
name = "cpal"
version = "0.18.0"
description = "Low-level cross-platform audio I/O library in pure Rust."
repository = "https://github.com/RustAudio/cpal"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/cpal"
license = "Apache-2.0"
keywords = ["audio", "sound"]
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.78"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]
targets = ["x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu", "x86_64-pc-windows-msvc", "x86_64-apple-darwin", "aarch64-apple-darwin", "aarch64-apple-ios", "wasm32-unknown-unknown", "aarch64-linux-android", "x86_64-unknown-freebsd", "x86_64-unknown-netbsd", "x86_64-unknown-dragonfly"]

[features]
audio_thread_priority = ["dep:audio_thread_priority"]
asio = ["dep:asio-sys", "dep:num-traits"]
audioworklet = ["wasm-bindgen", "web-sys/Blob", "web-sys/BlobPropertyBag", "web-sys/Url", "web-sys/AudioWorklet", "web-sys/AudioWorkletNode", "web-sys/AudioWorkletNodeOptions"]
custom = []
jack = ["dep:jack"]
pipewire = ["dep:pipewire"]
pulseaudio = ["dep:pulseaudio", "dep:futures"]
wasm-bindgen = ["dep:wasm-bindgen", "dep:wasm-bindgen-futures"]

[dependencies]
dasp_sample = "0.11"

[dev-dependencies]
anyhow = "1.0"
hound = "3.5"
ringbuf = "0.4"

[dev-dependencies.clap]
version = ">=4.0, <=4.5.57"
features = ["derive"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows]
version = ">=0.59, <=0.62"
features = ["Win32_Media", "Win32_Media_Audio", "Win32_Foundation", "Win32_Devices_Properties", "Win32_Media_KernelStreaming", "Win32_System_Com_StructuredStorage", "Win32_System_Threading", "Win32_System_Performance", "Win32_Security", "Win32_System_SystemServices", "Win32_System_Variant", "Win32_Media_Multimedia", "Win32_UI_Shell_PropertiesSystem"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.audio_thread_priority]
version = "0.34"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.asio-sys]
version = "0.3.0"
path = "asio-sys"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.num-traits]
version = "0.2"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.jack]
version = "0.13"
optional = true

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies]
alsa = "0.11"
libc = "0.2"

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.audio_thread_priority]
version = "0.34"
optional = true

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.jack]
version = "0.13"
optional = true

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.pulseaudio]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.futures]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.pipewire]
version = "0.9"
optional = true
features = ["v0_3_53"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies]
mach2 = "0.5"

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.coreaudio-rs]
version = "0.14"
default-features = false
features = ["core_audio", "audio_toolbox"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-audio]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "AudioHardware", "AudioHardwareDeprecated", "objc2", "objc2-foundation"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-audio-toolbox]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "AUComponent", "AudioUnitProperties"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-audio-types]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "CoreAudioBaseTypes"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-foundation]
version = "0.3"

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "NSArray", "NSString", "NSValue"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2]
version = "0.6"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.jack]
version = "0.13"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"ios\")".dependencies]
block2 = "0.6"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"ios\")".dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3"
features = ["block2", "NSDictionary", "NSNotification", "NSOperation"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"ios\")".dependencies.objc2-avf-audio]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "AVAudioSession", "AVAudioSessionTypes"]

[target."cfg(all(target_arch = \"wasm32\", target_os = \"unknown\"))".dependencies.wasm-bindgen]
version = "0.2"
optional = true
